query: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.workspaceId, u.workspaceRole, w.name AS ws_name, w.subscriptionStatus FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = u.workspaceId WHERE u.workspaceRole = 'owner' AND (w.subscriptionStatus IS NULL OR w.subscriptionStatus != 'active');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ScXmtJuaTeKxeck.a823cb61aea9 --database ZqvPyEVdTkw9DPvc2ezGwV --execute SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.workspaceId, u.workspaceRole, w.name AS ws_name, w.subscriptionStatus FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = u.workspaceId WHERE u.workspaceRole = 'owner' AND (w.subscriptionStatus IS NULL OR w.subscriptionStatus != 'active');
